Issues: Technical Resolution/Print Quality: The image quality, while stylized, appears low resolution and might not be suitable for high-quality commercial printing (e.g., large posters or high-end merchandise).
Lack of Specific Licensing: Without knowing the origin of the artwork, there is a potential risk regarding existing IP rights, although the image itself is a generic illustration.

Commercial Appeal Enhancement: While the design is cute, commercial viability could be significantly increased by offering higher resolution files, cleaner lines, or offering variations/full character packs.
